initiatives.name: Jeannette Rankin Peace Center
initiatives.description: A community center fostering mutual aid and social justice through peace education, cultural programming, and fair trade in Missoula. They coordinate educational resources, community events, and solidarity networks while building power through peace advocacy, global connections, and creating spaces for movement building and nonviolent action.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Missoula
initiatives.description: Local mutual aid collective sharing meals with community in need.

initiatives.name: Western Montana LGBTQ+ Community Center
initiatives.description: We empower our community through education, advocacy, and collaborative networking. We strive to be Western Montana’s voice for the LGBTQ+ community and allies.

initiatives.name: Western Montana DSA
initiatives.description: We believe all people should run the economic and political system democratically to meet human & environmental needs.
